interpretation.positive_result: Current no-flag c8 512/128 stays generated-token green under rocprofv3 with rowchunk layers 3,7,11,15,19,23 and expected native batch attention/KV/projection/MoE/sampler kernels present.
interpretation.status_nuance: rocprofv3 returned rc=1 because the profiled retained-bench process exits blocked/non-retained, but it emitted a valid bench JSON and kernel trace. The blocked status is due to retained performance/scaling/provenance gates, not generated-token equality.
interpretation.no_claim: This is profiler/runtime evidence only; no retained throughput/scaling claim is made while c8 uses selected rowchunked full attention and native_caware_decode=false.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: c8 generated-token equality is green under rocprofv3 and expected native batch attention/KV/projection/MoE/sampler kernels are present on HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 / RX 7900 XTX; no performance claim.

conclusion: Current c8 default profiler smoke is green for token equality and expected-kernel presence; retained performance remains blocked by rowchunk/native-caware status and claim prerequisites.
